channel.title: Vault Obs Sync

item.title: TreeScheme - ExAraman&Glynn
item.description: Definewe haveSet ThenDefineWe want to haveIn this case, , for .Split the sum in and For ,ThenAdding and subtracting the right term, we obtainFor ,ThenWe take the first term and sum over :Applying summation by parts, we obtainReducing the last term, we getWe take the second and the third termReducing the second term, we getAdding the contribution of the diagonal term , the result of the summation by parts, and the remaining terms for , we obtainThen, observing the exact cancellation , we obtainLet us now estimate the third term:On the one hand, we have thisOn the other hand, we obtainCombining both estimates, we conclude thatLet us now estimate the fourth term:First we split the sum and we getThen bounding and we haveFinally, for large enough, the right-hand side is bounded by , and we conclude thatLet us now estimate the fifth term:We now split this into four pieces:For the first one,The second and third pieces are estimated in the same way, and they also satisfyFor the fourth onePutting everything together, we conclude thatWe now estimate the first termBy the asymptotic behavior of , there exist and such that, for every ,Then,Finally, since , we have , soLet us now estimate the second term:On the one hand, by the asymptotic behavior of and , we haveOn the other hand, we obtainHence, for large enough,Since , we may rewrite it asUsing the same decomposition as before, we haveThe second and third terms are exactly of the same type as the contributions already estimated in and :In this case, , for and we work with the term
